Note.title: Note
Note.description: Represents a single user note with content, pinning status, and timestamps.

content.description: The rich text or plain text content of the note.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this note.

updatedAt.description: When the note was last updated.

pinned.description: Whether the note is pinned by the user.

/notes/{noteId}.description: Collection of notes stored in the database.
